# GitHub Actions Workflows

This directory contains GitHub Actions workflow definitions for CI/CD automation.

## Contents

- Testing workflows
- Linting and code quality checks
- Build and deployment workflows
- Release automation
- Documentation generation

## Workflow Files

Each workflow is a separate YAML file:
- `test.yml` - Run tests on push and PR
- `lint.yml` - Code style and quality checks
- `build.yml` - Build and package application

## Documentation

For GitHub Actions configuration, see:
- [GitHub Actions Documentation](https://docs.github.com/en/actions)
- `PLAYBOOK.md` for development workflow
